title: Lord of Mysteries
synopsis: Zhou Mingrui possessed and reborn Klein Moretti who committed suicide due to the sealed artifact "Antigonus Family Notes". Zhou Mingrui once again held a "Transfer Ceremony" in order to return to Earth, but accidentally entered a mysterious gray fog space. Dur

title: Dara-san of Reiwa
synopsis: Clouds blacken the sky and sheets of rain turn the mountain forest into a treacherous maze... A landslide crushes a razor wire fence, and buries a "NO TRESPASSING" sign... Two young siblings wander into a dark world where they do not belong, and a long, horrid shadow rears up to meet them- Anyway, so that's how we met Dara-san! She might look kinda scary, but just wait until you get to know her! "Look, I'm a god of misfortune, okay!? Aren't you kids gonna freak out about my grotesque visage!?" (Source: Yen Press)

title: Tsurenai hodo Aokute Azatoi kurai ni Akai

synonyms: Tan frío como el azul y tan agresivo como el rojo
Cold as Blue & Aggressive as Red
synopsis: Is this senior... female? Male? Neutral? Demonic? A transfer student suffering from an incurable disease called curiosity meets a mysterious being (human) who is beautiful, cute, cool, and terrifying. The first of a new generation of horror comic authors presents an abyssal love story, a ghost story to peek into.

title: Animan
synopsis: Are we the predators or the prey? When an unsuspecting father and daughter stumble upon a strange gathering of humanoid animals with a taste for fine cuisine, their worst nightmare is about to begin. Here, creatures who are not quite human-and not quite animal at that-raise humans as livestock and slaughter them to put meat on the table. Through this bizarre and horrific tale, society's morals are put to the ultimate test: What does it truly mean to consume another living being? (Source: Yen Press)

title: Seeds of Anxiety: Asterisk
synopsis: In the beginning, this place was filled with someone's memories—sad memories. With the passage of time, those memories break down, and every so often, they creep into our everyday world as…disturbances. Why do they show themselves to us? Perhaps they seek a mouthpiece for their own despair, or something else entirely. When strangeness takes root in a place of woe, the seeds of dread begin to germinate… (Source: Yen Press)

title: Kuhime
synopsis: The beautiful woman who eats humans, hideously but attractively. Seiji Kidou, a college student, together with his friends as part of their test of courage visited an abandoned building. There, they are attacked by a voluptuous human-eater and the person whom Seiji was in love with, Hayase, is killed by the monster. While he was running away, before him, a strange girl, Kiri, who has the same power as the monster appeared and helped him... (Source: Kadokawa)

title: The Mask of Truth
synopsis: By chance, Wu Mian obtained a mask that forces absolute obedience on other people. But even then, he couldn't muster up the courage to confess to the girl he had a crush on. Until an incident that turned his life completely upside down... (Source: QQ, translated)

title: Meogi
synopsis: Ominous beings are intruding into our reality... Park Yun-yeong has a mysterous power which allows her to see ghastly creatures that seem to inhabit our world but not interact with it - unless they notice you acknowledge their existence. That’s when they stop being harmless. (Source: Naver, translated & edited)

titleRomaji: Gyakusatsu Happy End : Ao no Shou
titleNative: 虐殺ハッピーエンド～蒼の章～
synonyms: Massacre Happy End: The Blue Chapter
synopsis: Ao Minato, a young man who murders his stepfather who repeatedly abused his family, ends up in a juvenile detention center. However, the sister he was supposed to protect commits suicide due to her suffering, and their older sister Akane has gone missing. Ao arrives at a certain shrine and prays for his sister's safety, his only hope, and vows to the god that he will do anything for that, but... The blockbuster panic suspense "Gyakusatsu Happy End". The new chapter has finally begun. (Source: Young Animal Web, translated, edited)

synopsis: Yuki, a girl in a rural town, studies art to become an artist in the city. One day, her sister leaves the town to fulfill her own dreams. Yuki boards the train with her to see her off, but during the journey, she is struck by a strange phenomenon!? Is it reality or an illusion... A chilling horror.

title: Mayu no Uta
synopsis: "I'll be your mother." After losing her biological mother, Mayu Kanda was abused by her guardian uncle every day, and could barely eat properly, but she just laughed it off. Until she met a mysterious beauty, Kamakura Komachi, who suddenly appeared. Is she, who acts like a mother, a ray of hope for Mayu? Or...? (Source: Ichijinsha, translated)

title: N
synopsis: My vision and mind were consumed by N. The disappearance of five junior high school boys. The brutal murder of an entire Elementary School class. A car crash leaving two dead. The letter "N" was left at the scene of each of these crimes. A popular urban legend has it that the main culprit is a religious group named "N," which was supposed to have collapsed 2,000 years ago. What on earth is "N"? (Source: Kadokawa, translated)

title: Kaii-bu: M-ken Y-shi no Kaigenshou ni Tsuite
titleRomaji: Kaii-bu: M-ken Y-shi no Kaigenshou ni Tsuite
titleNative: 怪異部～M県Y市の怪現象について～
synopsis: When transfer student Sakura Sakuraba arrives in Yuuyamichou, she discovers a place steeped in bizarre, ancient customs. The children there all have strange names and are bound by a curse that prevents them from leaving the city until they graduate high school. Caught in an escalating nightmare, Sakura must navigate curses, summonings, and betrayals. To break the curse and free the children, Sakura teams up with Uzu Andou, the mysterious president of the Paranormal Club. Their strange "club activities" are about to begin! (Source: Kadokawa, translated)

title: Doukutsu Ningen
synopsis: The story follows a young man Hajime who returns to his hometown and meets up with an old friend. While catching up, the two somehow find themselves in front of the local legend: The Man-Eating Cave. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Cry Eye
synopsis: Asahi and her friend Yamato went together to an exclusive event as test players for a new game from the cellphone-game company "Sky Nova." The test players were a diverse lot of all ages, from ordinary teens like Asahi to popular idols. The company took all of them on a cruise to explain the rules of this island-based, treasure-hunting survival game. Suddenly, during the presentation, all of the participants lost consciousness. They woke up on an actual island wearing a strange watch with the words "Game Start." Now they are all stuck in this survival game, which has become all too real and deadly!

title: Koppa Maichiru Sono Koro ni
titleNative: 木っ端舞い散る その頃に
synopsis: Kei Maebara gets a job!! The bizarre and eerie world of public service, depicted by Ryukishi07, from Higurashi When They Cry . In the 13th year of the Heisei era, in the Tokyo Metropolitan Area, Coastal Region... Due to the prolonged economic recession, the police force has weakened, and the growing number of disillusioned youth turning to semi-criminal lifestyles has led to a drastic decline in public safety... Amidst all this, Kei Maebara begins working at the district office. Can he become a respectable public servant? (Source: Akita Shoten, translated)

chapterSourceTitle: Koppa Mai Chiru - Sono Koro ni

title: Collector
synopsis: A man admires the beauty of a woman of whom he is with. What happens when he wants it?

title: Chenyuan
synopsis: To investigate a kidnapping case, Xue Zhao, a profiler, went deep into a village of a foreign race, but was haunted by the villager's worship of [Him]. The pale face of Ji Li was looming, and his cold and wet long hair followed him like a shadow. Is the grace He bestowed a gentle killing intent or a bloody love word? The sacrifice He demanded was Xue Zhao's arrogant mind or his cold heart? Is the ghost you... or me? (Source: Bilibili, translated)
